name: Complete Blood Count
description: Evaluates red cells, white cells, hemoglobin, and platelets.

name: Erythrocyte Sedimentation Rate
description: Measures inflammation indirectly by red cell sedimentation.

name: Blood Group and Rh Typing
description: Determines ABO blood group and Rh status.

name: Prothrombin Time
description: Assesses blood clotting through the extrinsic pathway.

name: D-Dimer
description: Helps evaluate abnormal clot formation and breakdown.

name: Random Blood Sugar
description: Measures blood glucose at any time.

name: HbA1c
description: Reflects average blood glucose over 2 to 3 months.

name: Blood Urea
description: Measures urea level for kidney evaluation.

name: Serum Uric Acid
description: Measures uric acid level in blood.

name: Urine Routine Examination
description: Routine physical, chemical, and microscopic examination of urine.

name: Urine Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects urinary tract infection and antibiotic sensitivity.
preparation: Collect clean-catch midstream sample before antibiotics

name: Urine Pregnancy Test
description: Detects hCG in urine for pregnancy screening.

name: Twenty Four Hour Urinary Protein
description: Measures total protein excreted in 24 hours.

name: Stool Routine Examination
description: Routine examination of stool for cells, ova, parasites, and occult findings.

name: Stool for Occult Blood
preparation: Avoid red meat and some drugs if advised

name: Beta Human Chorionic Gonadotropin
description: Measures serum hCG for pregnancy or related conditions.

name: Serum Prolactin
preparation: Morning sample preferred; avoid stress before test

name: Electrocardiogram
description: Records electrical activity of the heart.

name: Echocardiogram
description: Ultrasound imaging of heart structure and function.

name: Ultrasonography Whole Abdomen
preparation: Fasting may be required; drink water if advised

name: Ultrasonography Pregnancy Profile
preparation: Full bladder may be required in early pregnancy

name: Magnetic Resonance Imaging Brain
description: Magnetic resonance imaging of the brain.

name: Dengue IgM Antibody
description: Serologic test for recent dengue infection.

name: Widal Test
description: Serologic test used in suspected typhoid fever.

name: Human Immunodeficiency Virus One and Two
preparation: Consent and counseling as per policy

name: Mantoux Test
description: Skin test used in tuberculosis screening.
preparation: Return after 48 to 72 hours for reading

name: Total RBC Count
description: Measures the number of red blood cells in blood.

name: Packed Cell Volume
description: Measures the percentage volume of red cells in blood.

name: Mean Corpuscular Volume
description: Measures average red blood cell size.

name: Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin
description: Measures average hemoglobin amount per red blood cell.

name: Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin Concentration
description: Measures average hemoglobin concentration in red blood cells.

name: Red Cell Distribution Width
description: Measures variation in red blood cell size.

name: Absolute Eosinophil Count
description: Measures absolute eosinophil count for allergy and parasitic conditions.

name: Absolute Neutrophil Count
description: Measures absolute neutrophil count for infection risk assessment.

name: Reticulocyte Count
description: Measures young red blood cells in circulation.

name: Direct Coombs Test
description: Detects antibodies attached to red blood cells.

name: Indirect Coombs Test
description: Detects circulating antibodies against red blood cells.

name: Fibrinogen
description: Measures fibrinogen level for coagulation assessment.

name: Fibrin Degradation Products
description: Measures fibrin degradation products in clot breakdown.

name: Lactate Dehydrogenase
description: Measures enzyme released during tissue injury.

name: Creatine Phosphokinase Total
description: Measures total creatine kinase from muscle and heart.

name: Serum Bicarbonate
description: Measures bicarbonate level for acid base assessment.

name: Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate
description: Estimates kidney filtration rate from creatinine.

name: Creatinine Clearance
description: Measures kidney clearance of creatinine using urine and blood.

name: Total Iron Binding Capacity
description: Measures capacity of serum proteins to bind iron.

name: Transferrin Saturation
description: Calculates percentage saturation of transferrin with iron.

name: Fasting Serum Insulin
description: Measures fasting insulin level for metabolic assessment.

name: Serum Lactate
description: Measures lactate level for tissue hypoxia assessment.
preparation: Send sample immediately on ice if instructed

name: Serum Ammonia
description: Measures ammonia level for liver and metabolic assessment.

name: High Sensitivity C Reactive Protein
description: Measures low grade inflammation and cardiac risk.

name: Procalcitonin
description: Measures biomarker associated with bacterial infection and sepsis.

name: Prostate Specific Antigen
preparation: Avoid ejaculation and prostate manipulation before test if possible

name: Alpha Fetoprotein
description: Tumor marker used mainly for liver and germ cell evaluation.

name: Carcinoembryonic Antigen
description: Tumor marker used in gastrointestinal malignancy monitoring.
normalRange: Non-smoker less than 3 / Smoker less than 5

name: Cancer Antigen 125
description: Tumor marker commonly used in ovarian disease monitoring.

name: Cancer Antigen 19-9
description: Tumor marker used in pancreatic and biliary disease monitoring.

name: Cancer Antigen 15-3
description: Tumor marker used in breast cancer monitoring.

name: Anti Thyroid Peroxidase Antibody
description: Detects thyroid peroxidase antibody for autoimmune thyroid disease.

name: Anti Thyroglobulin Antibody
description: Detects thyroglobulin antibody in autoimmune thyroid disease.

name: Serum Estradiol
preparation: Cycle day as advised by physician
normalRange: Varies by sex and cycle phase

name: Serum Progesterone
preparation: Cycle day as advised by physician

name: Serum Cortisol Morning
preparation: Collect at 8 AM unless instructed otherwise

name: Parathyroid Hormone
description: Measures parathyroid hormone level for calcium disorders.

name: Urine Albumin Creatinine Ratio
description: Measures urine albumin to creatinine ratio for kidney risk.

name: Urine Microalbumin
description: Detects small amounts of albumin in urine.

name: Urine Creatinine
preparation: Random or 24 hour collection as instructed

name: Urine Reducing Substance
description: Screens for reducing sugars in urine.

name: Urine Cytology
description: Microscopic cytology evaluation of urine cells.

name: Semen Analysis
description: Evaluates semen volume sperm count motility and morphology.

name: Stool Reducing Substance
description: Screens stool for reducing sugars in diarrhea evaluation.

name: Stool Calprotectin
description: Measures intestinal inflammation marker in stool.

name: Helicobacter Pylori Stool Antigen
description: Detects H pylori antigen in stool.
preparation: Avoid antibiotics and PPI as advised

name: Blood Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects bloodstream infection and antibiotic sensitivity.
preparation: Collect before antibiotics preferably during fever

name: Sputum Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects respiratory pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Sputum for AFB Microscopy
description: Microscopic detection of acid fast bacilli for tuberculosis.
preparation: Early morning deep cough sputum preferred

name: GeneXpert MTB RIF
description: Detects tuberculosis DNA and rifampicin resistance.

name: Throat Swab Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects throat pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Pus Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects pus pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Wound Swab Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects wound pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: High Vaginal Swab Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects vaginal pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Semen Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects bacterial growth in semen and antibiotic sensitivity.
preparation: Collect in sterile container before antibiotics

name: Cerebrospinal Fluid Routine Examination
description: Routine biochemical and microscopic examination of CSF.
preparation: Collected by clinician under sterile procedure

name: Cerebrospinal Fluid Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects CSF bacterial growth and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Pleural Fluid Routine Examination
description: Routine biochemical and microscopic examination of pleural fluid.

name: Pleural Fluid Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects pleural fluid pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Ascitic Fluid Routine Examination
description: Routine biochemical and microscopic examination of ascitic fluid.

name: Ascitic Fluid Culture and Sensitivity
description: Detects ascitic fluid pathogens and antibiotic sensitivity.

name: Anti HBs Antibody
description: Measures hepatitis B surface antibody immunity.

name: Anti HBc IgM Antibody
description: Detects recent hepatitis B core antibody response.

name: Dengue IgG Antibody
description: Detects past or secondary dengue infection.

name: COVID 19 RT PCR
description: Detects SARS CoV 2 RNA by PCR.

name: COVID 19 Rapid Antigen
description: Rapid antigen test for SARS CoV 2 infection.

name: Toxoplasma IgG Antibody
description: Detects past exposure to toxoplasma infection.

name: Rubella IgG Antibody
description: Assesses rubella immunity or past infection.

name: Helicobacter Pylori IgG Antibody
description: Detects antibody response to H pylori infection.

name: X Ray Paranasal Sinuses
preparation: Remove metallic objects from head and neck

name: X Ray KUB Region
description: Plain radiograph of kidneys ureters and bladder region.

name: Ultrasonography KUB
description: Ultrasound evaluation of kidneys ureters and bladder.

name: Ultrasonography Pelvis
preparation: Full bladder required unless instructed otherwise

name: Ultrasonography Hepatobiliary System
description: Ultrasound evaluation of liver gallbladder and biliary system.

name: Transvaginal Ultrasonography
description: Transvaginal ultrasound evaluation of uterus and adnexa.

name: Color Doppler Lower Limb Venous
description: Doppler ultrasound assessment of lower limb veins.

name: Computed Tomography Scan Chest
preparation: Fasting if contrast is planned; bring creatinine report if advised

name: Computed Tomography Scan Whole Abdomen
preparation: Fasting 4-6 hours if contrast is planned

name: High Resolution CT Chest
description: High resolution CT evaluation of lung parenchyma.
preparation: No special preparation unless contrast planned

name: Magnetic Resonance Imaging Lumbar Spine
preparation: Remove metal objects; MRI safety screening required

name: Mammography
description: X ray imaging of breast for screening or diagnosis.
preparation: Avoid deodorant or powder on day of test

name: Bone Mineral Density
description: Measures bone density for osteoporosis assessment.
preparation: Avoid calcium supplement before test if advised

name: Exercise Tolerance Test
description: Exercise ECG test for inducible cardiac ischemia assessment.
preparation: Wear walking shoes and follow medicine instructions from doctor
